exercises.name: Pilates - Roll Like a Ball with Ball Between Knees
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent and a ball between them. Roll back onto your shoulders and return to balance.

exercises.name: Pilates - Rolling Like a Ball
exercises.description: Sit on the mat, hug your knees to your chest, balance on your sit bones, then roll back onto your shoulders and return to the starting position smoothly.

exercises.name: Pilates - Rolling Like a Ball into Teaser
exercises.description: Start in a rolling like a ball position. Roll back, then extend your legs into a teaser position before rolling back again.

exercises.name: Pilates - Roll-Up
exercises.description: Lie flat, extend arms overhead. Roll up one vertebra at a time, reaching towards toes, then slowly roll back down with control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Roll-Up with Ball Between Knees
exercises.alternateName: Slow full crunch with med ball
exercises.description: Lie on your back with a ball between your knees. Engage your core and roll up to a seated position, then roll back down.

exercises.name: Pilates - Saw
exercises.description: Sit with legs wide apart, extend arms, rotate the torso, and reach one hand toward the opposite foot, alternating sides.

exercises.name: Pilates - Scissors
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift both legs, then alternate lowering and lifting each leg while engaging your core.

exercises.name: Pilates - Seal
exercises.description: Sit with soles of feet together, wrap hands around ankles, rock back onto shoulders, then return to balance while clapping feet together.

exercises.name: Pilates - Seated Forward Fold
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended and reach forward toward your toes while keeping your back long.

exercises.name: Pilates - Seated Russian Twist with Ball
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent and hold a ball. Twist your torso side to side while keeping the ball controlled.

exercises.name: Pilates - Shoulder Bridge
exercises.description: Lie on your back, bend knees, lift hips towards the ceiling, squeeze glutes, then lower with control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Kick Series (Circles)
exercises.description: Lie on your side, make controlled circular motions with the top leg, keeping hips steady.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Kick Series (Front/Back)
exercises.description: Lie on your side, lift the top leg, kick it forward and backward while keeping hips stable.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Kick Series (Up/Down)
exercises.description: Lie on your side, lift the top leg up and lower it with control, keeping the core engaged.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Kick Series with Ball Under Ribs
exercises.description: Lie on your side with a ball under your ribs. Perform side kicks while maintaining balance.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Kneeling Oblique Pulldown Miniband
exercises.description: Kneel on one side and hold a miniband overhead. Pull the band down while crunching your obliques.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Kneeling Oblique Twist
exercises.description: Kneel on one side with one hand on the floor and the other behind your head. Twist your torso down, then return to starting position.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Lying Developé
exercises.description: Lie on your side with the bottom leg bent for support. Point the top toe and slowly lift the leg, extending it fully in a controlled, upward arc. Lower with precision. Focus on length and control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Lying Oblique Leg Lift
exercises.description: Lie on your side with legs extended. Lift the top leg while engaging the obliques.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side Lying Oblique Leg Pulse
exercises.description: Lie on your side and lift your top leg slightly. Pulse the leg up and down while engaging the obliques.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side-Lying Inner Thigh Circles
exercises.description: Lie on one side with the bottom leg extended. Lift the leg slightly and make small controlled circles, engaging the inner thigh.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side-Lying Inner Thigh Lifts
exercises.description: Lie on one side and extend the bottom leg while keeping the top leg bent. Lift the bottom leg, engaging the inner thigh. Lower and repeat.

exercises.name: Pilates - Side-Lying Leg Lifts with Ball Between Ankles
exercises.description: Lie on your side with a ball between your ankles. Lift and lower your legs together in a controlled motion.

exercises.name: Pilates - Single Leg Circle Left (Contralateral)
exercises.description: Perform the same movement as the right side, drawing controlled circles with the left leg while keeping hips stable.

exercises.name: Pilates - Single Leg Circle Right (Contralateral)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, extend one leg upward, engage your core, and draw controlled circles with the leg while keeping hips stable.

exercises.name: Pilates - Single Leg Kick
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, support yourself on forearms, and kick one leg towards your glutes, alternating sides.

exercises.name: Pilates - Single Leg Stretch
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift your head and shoulders, extend one leg while pulling the opposite knee towards the chest, alternating sides.

exercises.name: Pilates - Single Leg Stretch with Twist
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift your head and shoulders, and extend one leg while twisting your torso toward the bent knee. Switch sides in a controlled manner.

exercises.name: Pilates - Spine Stretch Forward
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended, reach arms forward, inhale to lengthen, then exhale as you reach forward, stretching the spine.

exercises.name: Pilates - Spine Stretch Forward with Ball Between Hands
exercises.description: Sit with legs extended and hold a ball. Reach forward, keeping the spine long.

exercises.name: Pilates - Spine Twist
exercises.description: Sit tall with legs extended, extend arms to the sides, twist the torso from side to side while keeping the core engaged.

exercises.name: Pilates - Squats with Ball Between Thighs
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart and a ball between your thighs. Lower into a squat while squeezing the ball.

exercises.name: Pilates - Standing Lunges with Ball Under Front Foot
exercises.description: Place a ball under your front foot while in a lunge position. Lower and lift with control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Standing Roll-Down
exercises.description: Stand tall, then slowly roll down one vertebra at a time, reaching for your toes. Reverse the movement to stand up.

exercises.name: Pilates - Standing Side Bend with Ball Between Hands
exercises.description: Stand tall and hold a ball between your hands. Bend side to side, keeping the core engaged.

exercises.name: Pilates - Static Glute Bridge with Heel Lifts
exercises.alternateName: Hip bridge hold with calve raise
exercises.description: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift hips into a bridge, then lift and lower your heels while maintaining the position.

exercises.name: Pilates - Swan
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, place hands under shoulders, engage your back muscles, and lift the chest while keeping legs on the floor.

exercises.name: Pilates - Swan with Ball
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach with a ball under your chest. Press up into a swan stretch while keeping control.

exercises.name: Pilates - Swimming
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, lift opposite arm and leg simultaneously in a fluttering motion, engaging the back and glutes.

exercises.name: Pilates - Swimming into Child’s Pose
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach and flutter your arms and legs. Then push back into child's pose for a stretch.
